{{Quote|I don't have much information regarding the Mokk stronghold other than the fact that the Mokk are a Dantari tribe.|[[Colonel/Legends|Colonel]] [[Darkstone]], to a spacer|<ref name="SWG:CD">{{SWGcite|exp=AED|type=other|Corellian Corvette Pre-Quest: "Colonel Darkstone"}}</ref>}}
[[File:Mokk_hunter.jpg|thumb|right|180px|A Mokk hunter]]
The '''Mokk''' were a [[Dantari]] tribe that lived on the [[Planet/Legends|planet]] [[Dantooine/Legends|Dantooine]].<ref name="SWG:DD" /> Most of the tribe lived in its [[Dantari Village (Mokk)|village]]<ref name="SWG:DV" /> but many Mokk, including their tribal leader, resided in the [[Mokk Stronghold]].<ref name="SWG:MS" /> Soothsayers and shamen were also part of the tribe.<ref name="SWG">{{GalaxiesAED}}</ref> The Mokk were in conflict with the [[Kunga]] and the [[Janta]], another Dantari tribes.<ref name="FS">{{SonyCite|url=content.jsp?page=Faction%20Standings|text=Faction Standings}}</ref> The Mokk were usually more hostile and aggressive towards strangers than other tribes.<ref name="SWG" />

During the [[Galactic Civil War/Legends|Galactic Civil War]], the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Galactic Empire]] suspected the [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Rebel Alliance]] to have contacts with the Mokk.<ref name="SWG:CD" />

==Behind the scenes==
The Mokk appeared in the [[2003]] [[Star Wars video games|video game]] ''[[Star Wars Galaxies]]'', a [[Wikipedia:Massively multiplayer online role-playing game|massively multiplayer online roleplaying game]] developed by [[Sony]] Online Entertainment and published by [[LucasArts]],<ref name="SWG" /> prior to its closure on [[December 15]], [[2011]].<ref name="Shutdown">{{SonyCite|url=playerinfo|text=IMPORTANT INFORMATION ABOUT ''STAR WARS'' GALAXIES™}}</ref>
